creator: josh@richesinengineering.com
text:
Hello, 
We would like to be added to the website as a consulting firm providing services in FreeBSD.

Thank you for your consideration!
Josh Richesin

Richesin Engineering has over 30 years of experience helping clients in the telecommunications industry.  FreeBSD is the OS of choice for critical network infrastructure and our team is the go-to consulting firm that most telecom companies use. Please check us out at www.richesinengineering.com
